summary: Feasibility analysis for converting TronikSlate into wan2gp Gradio plugins. Covers what TronikSlate contains (12 UI groups, 15 server routes), what the wan2gp plugin system supports (Gradio tabs only), why full conversion is impossible (React UI, Express server, timeline/audio/NLE features), which features CAN be extracted as individual plugins (Prompt Assistant, Storyboard, Shot Editor, Image Manager), why the existing Smooth Brain plugin lost features (code drift between root and plugin), and a recommended strategy going forward.
